{{Quote|Jervis Gloom. Coruscant Police want him alive. My sources tell me he works the entertainment sector.|Rozatta to Jango Fett|<ref name="BH" />}}
'''Jervis Gloom''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Death stick/Legends|death stick]] [[Slythmonger/Legends|dealer]] who lived on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] and had long posed problems for the [[Coruscant Security Force]] during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

==Biography==
In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], Jervis Gloom was believed to have grown up in the bowels of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant's]] rough streets. He made a living peddling [[Death stick/Legends|death sticks]] in Coruscant's entertainment districts working for crime lords as they came and went - earning him a 5,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credit]] bounty (alive) by the CSF - until he was captured by [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]]. Fett interrogated Gloom for information on the [[Bando Gora/Legends|Bando Gora]], information that would lead Jango to [[Groff Haugg]] and eventually to corrupt [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Connus Trell]].<ref name="BH" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' {{1st}}
